data.content:
Now I have the full picture. Let me identify the version conflicts and create the CPM setup:

- **System.Text.Json**: 10.0.1 (Api, Shared, Tests) vs 8.0.4 (Worker) → **10.0.1**
- **Azure.Identity**: 1.13.2 (Api) vs 1.11.4 (Shared) → **1.13.2**

arguments.file_text:
<Project>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>true</ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageVersion Include="Azure.Identity" Version="1.13.2" />
    <PackageVersion Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting" Version="8.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting" Version="1.15.0" />
    <PackageVersion Include="System.Text.Json" Version="10.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="xunit" Version="2.9.3" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>

data.reasoningText:
Now I have all the information. Let me analyze the package versions:

| Package | Api | Worker | Shared | Tests |
|---------|-----|--------|--------|-------|
| System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 | 8.0.4 | 10.0.1 | 10.0.1 |
| Azure.Identity | 1.13.2 | - | 1.11.4 | - |
| Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting | - | 8.0.1 | - | - |
| OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting | - | 1.15.0 | - | - |


| xunit | - | - | - | 2.9.3 |

I've identified the version conflicts: System.Text.Json has 10.0.1 and 8.0.4 across projects, and Azure.Identity has 1.13.2 versus 1.11.4. I'll use the highest versions for each. My approach is to create a centralized package management file at the solution root that declares all package versions, then remove the individual version specifications from each project file.

arguments.file_text:
<Project>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>true</ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageVersion Include="Azure.Identity" Version="1.13.2" />
    <PackageVersion Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting" Version="8.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting" Version="1.15.0" />
    <PackageVersion Include="System.Text.Json" Version="10.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="xunit" Version="2.9.3" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>

Done. Created `Directory.Packages.props` with Central Package Management enabled. Two version conflicts were resolved using the highest version:

- **System.Text.Json**: 8.0.4 → **10.0.1**
- **Azure.Identity**: 1.11.4 → **1.13.2**

All `Version` attributes removed from `PackageReference` elements in the 4 project files.
